_meta.description: Canonical registry of patterns requiring propagation sweeps. When a staged/pushed diff touches one of these patterns, sibling files matching searchGlob are scanned for the antiPattern (bad version). Consumed by check-propagation-staged.js and check-propagation.js.
_meta.howToAdd: Add a new entry to the 'patterns' array below. Required fields: id (kebab-case), description, pattern (regex for correct usage), antiPattern (regex for incorrect usage, or null for import-check), searchGlob (array of globs), severity (BLOCK or WARN), missDetection (antiPattern or patternAbsence), source (PR/retro reference). AI: during /pr-retro, when a propagation miss is identified, propose adding it here.

patterns.description: Error sanitization — use sanitizeError() instead of raw error.message
Symlink guard before writes — use isSafeToWrite()
TOCTOU guard — use lstatSync + isSymbolicLink, not bare statSync
Path containment — use validatePathInDir() after path.resolve()
Markdown injection — use escapeCell() for dynamic content in table cells
Node executable — use process.execPath, not hardcoded 'node'
Safe filesystem writes — use safeWriteFileSync() with symlink guard
Path traversal check — use regex test, not startsWith('..')
Symlink rejection — use refuseSymlink(), isSafeToWrite(), or safeWriteFileSync() for fs mutations
patterns.source: PR #397, #503 — symlink guard propagation. Updated PR #507 R1: switched from patternAbsence to antiPattern so parser-only files (parse-jsonl-line.js) that do zero file I/O no longer trigger. Pairs with safe-to-write which covers writeFileSync specifically.

patterns.description: Use Number.NaN instead of bare NaN for explicitness
